chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-633 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.1351/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on M.A No.1352/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 Mr.Arbab Ali Jinj, Advocate for the Petitioner ******** 1. Disposed of. 2to4. Counsel for the petitioner submits that he has filed this petition after site-stepping the lower forum because he apprehends grave harm will be caused to him and the detainee if he moves this relief before the proper forum. However, in this petition Dilber Ali, who is alleged to be husband of detainee without providing any explanation has sought relief available under the provisions of Cr.P.C which he could have claimed before the lower forum. It is trite proposition that before invoking writ jurisdiction, the petitioner must exhaust alternate remedy. Accordingly, as the Regular bench, I am constrained to grant relief in writ jurisdiction. Given the above observation, Counsel for the petitioner does not wish to press the above petition and submits that he will move appropriate application in accordance with law before the proper forum. Suffice to say, in case petitioner is still aggrieved after pursuing the matter before the competent forum, he will, of-course, have all the remedies available to him under the law, including approaching this Court. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
